docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, ALEXANDER $4,453.51 PRINCIPAL, $323.43 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,776.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76058161)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $323.43 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 76058161) AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ALEXANDER
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75491793) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 75491793) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75491793) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ALEXANDER DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-21-2025
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75538542), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SERVED JAN-26-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ALEXANDER
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 76058161) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY STATUS AND 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 76058161) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76058161) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75491793) TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, ALEXANDER $8,004.64 PRINCIPAL, $297.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,302.25, SEE SCANNED DOC
